{{Quote|In addition to standard administrative defense and intellectual property enforcement needs, the Melody Fellowship's prime assets are typically scattered over the galaxy providing performance services. We developed the new RO-D series droid specifically for tours.|Hoipa Vonill|<ref name="bsmrc">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|business/13516_4.html|Balmorran Secures Musician Rearmament Contract}} {{1st}}</ref>}}
'''Hoipa Vonill''' was the [[Technology Lead]] of [[Balmorran Arms/Legends|Balmorran Arms]], that would develop the [[RO-D-series droid]] for the [[Melody Fellowship]].<ref name="bsmrc" />
